chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No 32 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 11.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. On 04.12.2025, following order was passed:- “Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qurush, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. Repeated opportunities have been given to the applicant’s counsel to reformulate the questions of law, however, the same has not been done. As a last chance adjourned to 11.12.2025. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file.” Today, learned counsel is present, however, the order remains uncomplied with. It appears that the department is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
